item.title: Presidential Permit for Enbridge Energy Limited Partnership Pipeline Operations at United States-Canada Border
item.description: This presidential permit authorizes Enbridge Energy, Limited Partnership, a Delaware limited partnership, to operate and maintain three existing pipeline facilities located at Pembina County, North Dakota, at the international boundary between the United States and Canada. The permit grants authority to the permittee to continue operations of these cross-border pipeline facilities subject to specified conditions outlined in the permit document. Disclaimer: This content is AI generated. Use at your own risk. Please consult the original articles for accurate information.

item.title: Presidential Permit for Enbridge Pipelines Southern Lights LLC to Operate Pipeline Facilities at United States-Canada Border
item.description: Presidential permit issued to Enbridge Pipelines (Southern Lights) L.L.C., a Delaware limited liability company, authorizing the operation and maintenance of existing pipeline facilities located in Pembina County, North Dakota, at the international boundary between the United States and Canada. The permit is granted subject to specified conditions and is issued under the authority vested in the President of the United States. Disclaimer: This content is AI generated. Use at your own risk. Please consult the original articles for accurate information.

item.title: Presidential Permit for Enbridge Energy Limited Partnership to Operate Pipeline Facilities at U.S.-Canada Border in North Dakota
item.description: Presidential permit issued to Enbridge Energy, Limited Partnership, a Delaware limited partnership, authorizing the operation and maintenance of existing pipeline facilities located at Pembina County, North Dakota, at the international boundary between the United States and Canada. The permit grants authority subject to specified conditions. Disclaimer: This content is AI generated. Use at your own risk. Please consult the original articles for accurate information.

item.title: Presidential Permit for Enbridge Energy Pipeline Operations at U.S.-Canada Border in North Dakota
item.description: This presidential permit authorizes Enbridge Energy, Limited Partnership, a Delaware limited partnership, to operate and maintain existing pipeline facilities located at the international boundary between the United States and Canada in Pembina County, North Dakota. The permit grants authority to the permittee to conduct operations at this cross-border location subject to specified conditions outlined in the permit documentation. Disclaimer: This content is AI generated. Use at your own risk. Please consult the original articles for accurate information.

item.title: Presidential Permit for Enbridge Energy Pipeline Operations at U.S.-Canada Border in North Dakota
item.description: This Presidential Permit authorizes Enbridge Energy, Limited Partnership, a Delaware limited partnership, to operate and maintain existing pipeline facilities located at the international boundary between the United States and Canada in Pembina County, North Dakota. The permit grants authority under powers vested in the President and is subject to specified conditions outlined in the permit document. Disclaimer: This content is AI generated. Use at your own risk. Please consult the original articles for accurate information.

item.title: Presidential Permit for Enbridge Energy Limited Partnership Pipeline Operations at U.S.-Canada Border
item.description: Presidential permit issued to Enbridge Energy, Limited Partnership, a Delaware limited partnership, authorizing the operation and maintenance of existing pipeline facilities located at the international boundary between the United States and Canada in St. Clair County, Michigan. The permit grants authority for the permittee to conduct specified pipeline operations at this cross-border location subject to conditions outlined in the permit documentation. Disclaimer: This content is AI generated. Use at your own risk. Please consult the original articles for accurate information.

item.title: Presidential Permit for Enbridge Energy Company to Operate Pipeline Facilities at U.S.-Canada Border in Michigan
item.description: This presidential permit grants authorization to Enbridge Energy Company, Inc., a Delaware corporation, to operate and maintain existing pipeline infrastructure located at the international boundary between the United States and Canada in St. Clair County, Michigan. The permit is issued pursuant to the President's authority under applicable law and is subject to specified conditions outlined in the document. Disclaimer: This content is AI generated. Use at your own risk. Please consult the original articles for accurate information.

item.title: Presidential Permit for Bakken Pipeline Company LP to Operate and Maintain Pipeline Facilities at United States-Canada Border in Burke County, North Dakota
item.description: This presidential permit grants Bakken Pipeline Company LP, a Delaware limited partnership, authorization to operate and maintain existing pipeline facilities located at Burke County, North Dakota, at the international boundary between the United States and Canada. The permit is issued subject to specified conditions and is based on the President's authority under applicable law. Disclaimer: This content is AI generated. Use at your own risk. Please consult the original articles for accurate information.

item.title: Presidential Permit for Bakken Pipeline Company LP International Pipeline Facilities
item.description: This presidential permit authorizes Bakken Pipeline Company LP, a Delaware limited partnership, to construct, connect, operate, and maintain pipeline facilities at Burke County, North Dakota, at the international boundary between the United States and Canada. The permit is granted subject to specified conditions and is issued under the authority vested in the President of the United States. Disclaimer: This content is AI generated. Use at your own risk. Please consult the original articles for accurate information.
